meaning: n.超时,加班,延长时间adj.超时的,加班的adv.加班地vt.使超时
examples: They pay $150 a day plus overtime.
This new order will mean working overtime.
I also put in a request for some overtime.
It was the second straight overtime game for Tulsa, which fell to Washington on Monday.
We're talking about pay cuts and overtime cuts or a choice to suspend tours.
